input_text: Malaysia kena invest lebih banyak dalam R&D kalau nak jadi negara maju. Sekarang ni spending baru 1% daripada GDP, jauh lagi ketinggalan dari Korea Selatan.
reason: Constructive commentary on Malaysia's R&D investment levels compared to developed nations. Legitimate policy discussion.

input_text: Tahniah kat Dr. Sheikh Muszaphar, angkasawan pertama Malaysia! Program angkasawan tu bukan setakat hantar orang ke angkasa, tapi inspire budak-budak kita untuk minat sains.
reason: Celebrating Malaysia's astronaut program and its inspirational impact on youth interest in science.

input_text: Solar farm kat Perlis tu memang besar. Dengar cerita boleh generate 50MW, cukup untuk power beribu-ribu rumah. Bagus la kerajaan push renewable energy.
reason: Positive commentary on large-scale solar farm development in Perlis and government renewable energy push.

input_text: Siapa dah try smart farming kat Malaysia? Guna drone untuk monitor sawah padi, jimat masa dan tenaga petani. Teknologi ni patut lebih meluas.
reason: Discussion about smart farming technology adoption for rice paddy monitoring in Malaysia. Constructive tech advocacy.

input_text: Cybersecurity awareness kat Malaysia masih rendah. Ramai lagi yang kena scam online sebab tak tahu cara protect diri. Kena ada lebih banyak kempen kesedaran.
reason: Raising awareness about cybersecurity literacy gaps in Malaysia and calling for more public education campaigns.

input_text: UKM baru launch pusat penyelidikan AI baru. Harap boleh tarik lebih ramai talent tempatan untuk kekal kat Malaysia instead of brain drain ke Singapore.
reason: Supportive of UKM's new AI research center and hope it addresses brain drain. Constructive national development discussion.

input_text: Biomass energy dari kelapa sawit ada potensi besar kat Malaysia. Daripada buang sisa kilang, better guna untuk jana elektrik. Win-win untuk semua.
reason: Discussion about palm oil biomass energy potential in Malaysia. Constructive environmental and economic suggestion.

input_text: Bangga tengok startup Malaysia macam Carsome dan Grab dah jadi unicorn. Ecosystem fintech kita makin matang, banyak lagi potensi nak berkembang.
reason: Pride in Malaysian startup ecosystem success stories and fintech growth. Positive economic commentary.

input_text: Green Building Index (GBI) kat Malaysia dah semakin popular. Bangunan hijau bukan je jimat tenaga, tapi juga lebih selesa untuk penghuni.
reason: Positive discussion about green building certification adoption in Malaysia and its benefits.

input_text: Hutan paya bakau kat Matang, Perak tu antara yang paling terjaga di dunia. Kita kena pastikan ia kekal terpelihara untuk generasi akan datang.
reason: Advocacy for preserving Matang mangrove forest in Perak for future generations. Environmental conservation message.

input_text: Korang tahu tak Malaysia ada lebih 15,000 spesies tumbuhan berbunga? Biodiversiti kita memang kaya, tapi kena jaga betul-betul la.
reason: Sharing Malaysia's flowering plant biodiversity facts and calling for conservation. Educational and positive.

input_text: Projek EV charging station kat highway utara-selatan dah mula beroperasi. Lama-lama makin senang la nak drive kereta elektrik jarak jauh kat Malaysia.
reason: Positive update on EV charging infrastructure development along Malaysia's main highway.

input_text: USM punya kajian tentang microplastics dalam sungai kat Pulau Pinang memang eye-opening. Kena kurangkan penggunaan plastik sekali guna, serius.
reason: Discussing USM research on microplastic pollution in Penang rivers and advocating for reduced plastic use.

input_text: Malaysia perlukan lebih ramai saintis wanita. Tengok Dr. Hayati Salleh, pakar virologi kita, memang inspiring. Anak perempuan pun boleh jadi saintis hebat.
reason: Advocating for more women in science in Malaysia, citing an inspiring Malaysian female virologist.

input_text: TNB dah mula pilot program smart meter kat KL. Boleh monitor penggunaan elektrik real-time, jimat bil dan kurangkan pembaziran tenaga.
reason: Informative post about TNB's smart meter pilot program in Kuala Lumpur and its energy-saving benefits.

input_text: Startup agritech Malaysia macam Aerodyne dah go global. Drone diorang dipakai kat lebih 35 negara. Proud Malaysian moment ni.
reason: Celebrating Malaysian agritech startup Aerodyne's global expansion. National pride in tech innovation.

input_text: Taman Negara dah 130 juta tahun, salah satu hutan hujan tertua di dunia. Kita ada tanggungjawab untuk jaga warisan alam ni.
reason: Highlighting Taman Negara's ancient rainforest heritage and conservation responsibility. Environmental awareness.

input_text: Petani kat Cameron Highlands dah mula guna IoT sensor untuk monitor suhu dan kelembapan tanah. Hasil tanaman makin baik, kurang penggunaan air pulak tu.
reason: Positive report on IoT adoption by Cameron Highlands farmers improving crop yields and water efficiency.

input_text: MOSTI baru announce RM2 bilion untuk dana sains dan teknologi. Harap kali ni allocation betul-betul sampai ke penyelidik, bukan hilang tengah jalan.
reason: Commentary on MOSTI's science funding with hope for proper allocation to researchers. Constructive policy feedback.

input_text: Sungai Klang Restoration Project tu memang penting. Dah terlalu lama sungai kita tercemar, at least sekarang ada usaha nak bersihkan balik.
reason: Support for the Klang River restoration project addressing long-standing pollution. Environmental advocacy.

input_text: Program angkasawan Malaysia patut dihidupkan balik. Bukan setakat hantar orang ke ISS, tapi kita boleh develop satellite technology sendiri.
reason: Advocating for revival of Malaysia's space program with focus on satellite technology development.

input_text: Ikan paus biru pernah dilihat kat perairan Sabah. Ecosystem laut kita memang unik, sebab tu coral triangle kat sini perlu dilindungi.
reason: Marine biodiversity awareness about whale sightings in Sabah waters and coral triangle conservation.

input_text: UM masuk top 60 QS World University Rankings untuk engineering. Tahniah! Bukti universiti kita boleh bersaing di peringkat global.
reason: Celebrating University of Malaya's global ranking achievement in engineering. Positive educational milestone.

input_text: Pokok ramin dan meranti dah semakin kurang kat hutan Malaysia. Kena serius pasal pembalakan haram ni, tak boleh biarkan habitat orang utan musnah.
reason: Concern about illegal logging and endangered timber species affecting orangutan habitats. Environmental conservation.

input_text: Siapa tahu pasal MyDigital initiative? Kerajaan nak digitalkan 80% perkhidmatan awam menjelang 2025. Kalau betul tercapai, memang game changer.
reason: Discussion about Malaysia's MyDigital government digitalization initiative and its potential impact.

input_text: Banjir makin teruk setiap tahun. Climate change memang real, kita kena adapt infrastructure untuk hadapi cuaca melampau. Bukan boleh ignore dah.
reason: Urgent call for climate adaptation in Malaysia's infrastructure to address worsening floods. Legitimate concern.

input_text: Lepas ni semua orang kena belajar coding. Kurikulum STEM kat sekolah Malaysia dah improve, tapi masih perlu lebih banyak hands-on learning.
reason: Advocacy for improved STEM education with more practical coding skills in Malaysian schools.

input_text: Koperasi peladang kat Kedah dah mula guna AI untuk ramalan cuaca dan optimize masa menuai padi. Impak dia memang ketara, rugi turun 20%.
reason: Reporting on AI weather forecasting adoption by Kedah farmer cooperatives reducing crop losses.

input_text: Kereta elektrik Proton EV tu bila nak keluar? Dah lama dengar cakap je. Kalau harga mampu milik, ramai rakyat Malaysia boleh switch dari petrol.
reason: Consumer inquiry about Proton's EV plans and affordability for Malaysian adoption. Legitimate market discussion.

input_text: Penyu kat Terengganu makin kurang bertelur. Pencemaran pantai dan cahaya buatan antara punca utama. Kita semua kena ambil berat pasal ni.
reason: Raising awareness about declining sea turtle nesting in Terengganu due to pollution and light contamination.

input_text: Malaysia punya geothermal energy potential kat Sabah belum diterokai sepenuhnya. Kalau dibangunkan, boleh jadi sumber tenaga yang stabil dan bersih.
reason: Discussion about untapped geothermal energy potential in Sabah as a clean energy source.

input_text: Tabiat kitar semula kat Malaysia masih rendah, baru 30% je recycling rate. Jiran kita Singapura pun 60%. Kena ada lebih banyak kemudahan kitar semula.
reason: Constructive comparison of recycling rates and call for better recycling infrastructure in Malaysia.

input_text: Rafflesia, bunga terbesar di dunia, cuma boleh jumpa di hutan Malaysia dan beberapa negara jiran. Kita kena protect habitat dia dari pembangunan.
reason: Biodiversity awareness about Rafflesia conservation and habitat protection from development.

input_text: Dah cuba Touch 'n Go eWallet? Fintech kat Malaysia makin senang, dari bayar parking sampai beli nasi lemak tepi jalan pun boleh scan QR.
reason: Positive commentary on fintech and cashless payment adoption in everyday Malaysian life.

input_text: MIMOS punya research dalam semiconductor memang underrated. Kalau government bagi lebih funding, kita boleh jadi player dalam global chip supply chain.
reason: Advocating for more support for MIMOS semiconductor research to enter global supply chain. Tech policy discussion.

input_text: Malaysia's investment in large-scale solar energy is finally paying off. The country now has over 2GW of installed solar capacity, making it a regional leader in renewable energy.
reason: Factual reporting on Malaysia's solar energy capacity achievement and regional leadership in renewables.

input_text: The Malaysian astronaut program was a pivotal moment for STEM education in this country. It showed our youth that space science isn't just for Americans and Russians.
reason: Reflecting on the Malaysian astronaut program's positive impact on STEM education and national aspirations.

input_text: Really impressed by UTM's hydrogen fuel cell research. If Malaysia can crack green hydrogen at scale, we could become a major clean energy exporter in ASEAN.
reason: Positive assessment of UTM's hydrogen research and Malaysia's potential as a clean energy exporter.

input_text: Penang's silicon valley ambitions are getting real. With Intel, AMD, and now more chip fabs expanding there, the semiconductor ecosystem is really taking shape.
reason: Commentary on Penang's growing semiconductor industry and multinational investments. Economic development discussion.

input_text: Malaysia needs to take climate resilience more seriously. With increasing flood events in Kelantan and Pahang, we need better early warning systems and flood mitigation infrastructure.
reason: Constructive call for improved climate resilience infrastructure and flood mitigation in eastern states.

input_text: Kudos to Malaysian researchers at UTHM for developing biodegradable packaging from pineapple leaf fibers. Innovation like this can reduce our plastic dependency.
reason: Celebrating UTHM's innovation in biodegradable packaging from agricultural waste. Positive research highlight.

input_text: The EV market in Malaysia is booming. From Tesla to BYD, more options are available now. But we really need to expand the charging network outside KL.
reason: Discussion about EV market growth in Malaysia and the need for charging infrastructure expansion.

input_text: AI adoption in Malaysian SMEs is still quite low. Many business owners don't understand how even basic automation can improve their operations. More training programs needed.
reason: Identifying gaps in AI adoption among Malaysian SMEs and calling for more training. Constructive business commentary.

input_text: PETRONAS Research Sdn Bhd is doing fascinating work on carbon capture and storage. If CCS technology matures, it could help Malaysia meet its net zero targets by 2050.
reason: Positive discussion about PETRONAS carbon capture research and Malaysia's net zero ambitions.

input_text: Cyberjaya was supposed to be Malaysia's tech hub, but it didn't quite live up to the hype. Still, the new push with KLIA Aeropolis and digital free zones shows the vision is evolving.
reason: Balanced reflection on Cyberjaya's tech hub evolution and new digital zone initiatives. Constructive critique.

input_text: Forest Research Institute Malaysia (FRIM) in Kepong is a hidden gem. Amazing canopy walkway and important conservation research happening right in the middle of KL.
reason: Promoting FRIM as both a public attraction and important conservation research facility near Kuala Lumpur.

input_text: Malaysia's fintech sector attracted over $1 billion in funding last year. E-wallets, digital banking, and payment gateways are transforming how Malaysians handle money.
reason: Reporting on Malaysia's fintech investment growth and digital payment transformation. Factual economic discussion.

input_text: The Sungai Way community solar project is a great model for other Malaysian neighborhoods. Residents share the cost and the clean energy generated. Real gotong-royong spirit.
reason: Positive example of community solar energy project embodying Malaysian gotong-royong cooperation spirit.

input_text: Cybersecurity threats are increasing globally. Malaysian companies need to invest more in SOC capabilities and not just rely on basic firewalls. Data breaches are getting more expensive.
reason: Advocacy for stronger cybersecurity investment by Malaysian companies. Professional tech advisory discussion.

input_text: UPM's research on converting palm oil waste into biofuel is groundbreaking. Malaysia produces so much palm oil waste — turning it into energy is a no-brainer.
reason: Highlighting UPM research on palm oil waste biofuel conversion as a sustainable energy innovation.

input_text: I love how MyDebit and DuitNow have made cashless payments so easy in Malaysia. Even my makcik at the pasar malam accepts QR payments now.
reason: Positive commentary on cashless payment adoption reaching grassroots Malaysian markets.

input_text: The Sabah Biodiversity Centre is doing critical work cataloguing endemic species. So many plants and animals found in Borneo exist nowhere else on Earth.
reason: Highlighting Sabah Biodiversity Centre's work on documenting endemic Borneo species. Conservation awareness.

input_text: Green building initiatives in Malaysia are growing. More developers are pursuing GBI certification, which means lower energy costs and smaller carbon footprints for new buildings.
reason: Positive trend reporting on green building certification growth in Malaysia's construction industry.

input_text: Malaysia has the potential to be a data center hub for Southeast Asia. With our strategic location, multilingual workforce, and competitive energy costs, the opportunity is huge.
reason: Discussing Malaysia's strategic advantages for becoming a regional data center hub. Business and tech analysis.

input_text: Monash University Malaysia campus is doing some excellent tropical disease research. Great to see international universities contributing to local health solutions.
reason: Praising Monash Malaysia's contribution to tropical disease research. Positive academic and health discussion.

input_text: The rise of precision agriculture in Malaysia could really help our food security. GPS-guided tractors, soil sensors, and data analytics are changing how we farm.
reason: Discussion about precision agriculture technology improving Malaysia's food security. Positive agritech advocacy.

input_text: Malaysia's coral reef systems are among the most biodiverse in the world. Protecting marine parks in Sipadan and Tioman should be a national priority.
reason: Advocating for marine conservation of Malaysia's coral reefs at Sipadan and Tioman. Environmental awareness.

input_text: Smart traffic management in KL using AI and real-time sensors could solve a lot of congestion issues. Some pilot projects are already showing results.
reason: Discussing AI-powered smart traffic solutions for KL congestion. Urban technology innovation.

input_text: Digital literacy programs need to reach rural areas too. It's not fair that only urban Malaysians get access to tech education and e-commerce opportunities.
reason: Advocating for equitable digital literacy access across urban and rural Malaysia. Social equity discussion.

input_text: Bank Negara's regulatory sandbox for fintech is one of the best in the region. It encourages innovation while still protecting consumers. Good balance.
reason: Positive assessment of Bank Negara's fintech regulatory framework balancing innovation and consumer protection.

input_text: 马来西亚的太阳能发展潜力巨大，全年日照充足，是发展光伏发电的理想地区。希望政府能继续推出更多激励措施。
reason: Advocating for solar energy development in Malaysia given year-round sunlight. Constructive energy policy discussion.

input_text: 槟城的半导体产业已经发展了几十年，现在正在向高端芯片制造转型。这对马来西亚的科技产业意义重大。
reason: Discussion about Penang's semiconductor industry upgrading to advanced chip manufacturing. Positive tech development.

input_text: 马来西亚的大学研究水平正在提高，尤其是在生物技术和材料科学领域。我们需要更多企业与大学合作，加速科研成果的商业化。
reason: Advocating for university-industry collaboration to commercialize biotech and materials science research in Malaysia.

input_text: 热带雨林里的药用植物资源丰富，马来西亚的研究人员正在用现代技术分析传统草药的有效成分。这是保护原住民知识的好方法。
reason: Highlighting research on traditional medicinal plants using modern technology while preserving indigenous knowledge.

input_text: 马来西亚的电子钱包市场竞争激烈，Touch 'n Go、Boost、GrabPay都在争夺用户。消费者受益于更多的优惠和便利。
reason: Overview of Malaysia's competitive e-wallet market benefiting consumers. Neutral fintech market analysis.

input_text: 气候变化导致马来西亚的极端天气事件增加。政府需要加大投资建设防洪基础设施，保护易受灾社区。
reason: Calling for climate adaptation investment in flood infrastructure to protect vulnerable Malaysian communities.

input_text: 马来西亚的珊瑚礁正面临白化威胁。海水温度上升对仙本那和刁曼岛的海洋生态系统造成了严重影响。
reason: Raising awareness about coral bleaching threats in Semporna and Tioman Island due to rising sea temperatures.

input_text: 电动车在马来西亚的销量快速增长，政府免除进口税和路税的政策效果明显。充电基础设施是下一个需要解决的问题。
reason: Discussing EV sales growth in Malaysia driven by tax incentives and the need for charging infrastructure.

input_text: 人工智能在马来西亚的医疗领域有很大的应用潜力，从医学影像分析到药物研发，都可以提高效率和准确性。
reason: Discussing AI applications in Malaysian healthcare including medical imaging and drug development.

input_text: 马来西亚的棕榈油产业需要更多的可持续发展措施。RSPO认证是一个好的开始，但覆盖面还需要扩大。
reason: Advocating for expanded sustainable palm oil certification through RSPO in Malaysia.

input_text: 柔佛的森林城市项目有很多绿色建筑设计理念，包括垂直绿化和雨水收集系统。希望这些理念能推广到全国。
reason: Highlighting green building innovations at Forest City, Johor, including vertical gardens and rainwater harvesting.

input_text: 马来西亚的网络安全市场正在快速成长。越来越多的本地公司提供专业的安全服务，这对保护国家数字基础设施至关重要。
reason: Positive commentary on Malaysia's growing cybersecurity industry and its importance for national digital infrastructure.

input_text: 沙巴和砂拉越的生物多样性研究还有很大的空间。很多物种可能还没被发现，需要更多的科考投入。
reason: Calling for more biodiversity research investment in Sabah and Sarawak where many species remain undiscovered.

input_text: 马来亚大学的纳米技术实验室在水处理方面取得了重要突破。这项技术可以帮助解决农村地区的饮用水安全问题。
reason: Highlighting University of Malaya nanotechnology breakthrough in water purification for rural communities.

input_text: 数字银行牌照的发放标志着马来西亚金融科技行业的新里程碑。这将有助于提高金融普惠性，特别是对于没有银行账户的群体。
reason: Discussing Malaysia's digital banking licenses as a milestone for financial inclusion of unbanked populations.

input_text: மலேசியாவின் சூரிய ஆற்றல் திட்டங்கள் மிகவும் ஊக்கமளிக்கின்றன. பெர்லிஸ் மற்றும் கெடா மாநிலங்களில் பெரிய சூரிய பண்ணைகள் அமைக்கப்பட்டுள்ளன.
reason: Positive commentary on Malaysia's solar energy projects in Perlis and Kedah states. Renewable energy support.

input_text: மலேசிய பல்கலைக்கழகங்களில் செயற்கை நுண்ணறிவு ஆராய்ச்சி வளர்ந்து வருகிறது. நமது இளைஞர்கள் தொழில்நுட்பத் துறையில் சிறந்து விளங்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Encouraging AI research growth in Malaysian universities and youth participation in technology.

input_text: மலேசியாவின் உயிரி பன்முகத்தன்மை உலகின் மிக முக்கியமானவற்றில் ஒன்று. ஒராங் உத்தான் மற்றும் மலாய்க் கரடிகளை பாதுகாக்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Advocating for conservation of Malaysia's biodiversity including orangutans and sun bears.

input_text: மின்சார வாகனங்கள் மலேசியாவில் பிரபலமாகி வருகின்றன. வரி விலக்குகள் நுகர்வோருக்கு மிகவும் உதவியாக உள்ளன.
reason: Positive discussion about growing EV popularity in Malaysia and helpful tax exemptions for consumers.

input_text: ஃபின்டெக் தொழில்நுட்பம் மலேசிய மக்களின் வாழ்க்கையை எளிதாக்கியுள்ளது. இணைய வங்கி சேவைகள் மூலம் கிராமப்புற மக்களும் நிதி சேவைகளை அணுகலாம்.
reason: Highlighting fintech's role in improving financial accessibility for rural Malaysians through digital banking.

input_text: மலேசியாவின் வானிலை மாற்றம் குறித்த ஆராய்ச்சி மிக முக்கியம். வெள்ள அபாயத்தை குறைக்க சிறந்த முன்னெச்சரிக்கை அமைப்புகள் தேவை.
reason: Calling for climate change research and improved early warning systems to reduce flood risks in Malaysia.

input_text: சைபர் பாதுகாப்பு விழிப்புணர்வு மலேசியாவில் அதிகரிக்க வேண்டும். ஆன்லைன் மோசடிகளிலிருந்து பொதுமக்களை பாதுகாக்க கல்வி அவசியம்.
reason: Advocating for cybersecurity awareness education to protect Malaysians from online fraud.

input_text: மலேசியாவின் பசுமை கட்டிட முன்முயற்சிகள் பாராட்டுக்குரியவை. ஆற்றல் சிக்கனமான கட்டிடங்கள் சுற்றுச்சூழலுக்கு நன்மை பயக்கும்.
reason: Praising Malaysia's green building initiatives and their environmental benefits through energy efficiency.

input_text: பெனாங்கில் உள்ள திறன்மிக்க விவசாயிகள் நவீன தொழில்நுட்பத்தை பயன்படுத்தி நெல் விளைச்சலை அதிகரித்துள்ளனர். இது மற்ற மாநிலங்களுக்கு முன்மாதிரி.
reason: Highlighting Penang farmers using modern technology to increase rice yields as a model for other states.

input_text: மலேசியாவின் விண்வெளி திட்டம் மீண்டும் தொடங்கப்பட வேண்டும். செயற்கைக்கோள் தொழில்நுட்பம் வேளாண்மை மற்றும் பேரிடர் மேலாண்மைக்கு உதவும்.

input_text: Bro, kau dah dengar pasal smart farming kat Kedah tu? They use drones and IoT sensors, memang next level la agriculture kita ni.
reason: Casual mixed-language discussion about smart farming technology adoption in Kedah. Positive and informative.

input_text: Weh serious ke Malaysia nak build nuclear power plant? I think renewable energy like solar and wind is safer la. What do you guys think?
reason: Mixed-language discussion about energy policy choices between nuclear and renewables. Legitimate policy debate.

input_text: Just visited FRIM kat Kepong, the canopy walk memang best! Tak sangka dalam KL ada hutan research centre yang amazing macam ni.
reason: Positive personal experience at Forest Research Institute Malaysia combining English and Malay. Tourism and science.

input_text: Fintech scene kat Malaysia memang growing fast gila. DuitNow QR dah everywhere, even makcik jual kuih tepi jalan pun accept digital payment dah.
reason: Mixed-language observation on rapid fintech and digital payment adoption across Malaysian society.

input_text: Korang, the coral bleaching kat Tioman is really worrying la. Water temperature naik, marine life suffer. We need to do something about climate change seriously.
reason: Mixed-language expression of concern about coral bleaching at Tioman Island due to climate change.

input_text: Cybersecurity kat Malaysia kena level up la bro. Banyak gila data breach cases lately. Companies need to invest more in protecting customer data, bukan lepas tangan je.
reason: Mixed-language call for improved corporate cybersecurity practices in Malaysia following data breaches.

input_text: My friend just got accepted into UTM's AI research program. Proud la, finally ada more Malaysians going into cutting-edge tech instead of all brain drain ke overseas.
reason: Celebrating a friend's acceptance into UTM AI research and hope for reducing brain drain. Positive and personal.

input_text: EV charging station kat mall dekat rumah aku finally siap. Now boleh charge while shopping. The future is here la, slowly but surely Malaysia pun catching up.
reason: Positive mixed-language update on EV charging infrastructure availability in local Malaysian malls.

input_text: Biodiversity kat Taman Negara memang unreal. 130 million years old! Pernah pergi hiking sana, the flora and fauna diversity macam nowhere else in the world.
reason: Enthusiastic mixed-language appreciation of Taman Negara's ancient biodiversity from personal hiking experience.

input_text: Green building trend kat Malaysia memang encouraging. Office baru company aku ada solar panels and rainwater harvesting. Jimat bil, bagus untuk alam sekitar juga.
reason: Mixed-language personal account of green building features at workplace including solar and rainwater systems.

input_text: Solar panel kat rumah aku dah save about RM300 sebulan on electricity bil. Best investment ever la. More Malaysians should consider going solar honestly.
reason: Personal testimony on residential solar panel savings encouraging other Malaysians to adopt solar energy.

input_text: Innovation hub kat Cyberjaya memang underrated. Banyak startup accelerator programs, but not enough people tahu about it. Kena promote lebih la.
reason: Mixed-language commentary promoting awareness of Cyberjaya's startup ecosystem and accelerator programs.

input_text: Drone technology untuk monitor ladang kelapa sawit dah makin common kat Sarawak. Precision agriculture ni can really help reduce environmental impact while maintaining yields.
reason: Mixed-language discussion on drone precision agriculture reducing environmental impact in Sarawak palm oil plantations.

input_text: Eh serious question — anyone here pakai digital bank macam GXBank or Boost Bank? How's the experience so far? Nak try tapi masih ragu-ragu.
reason: Mixed-language inquiry about digital banking experiences in Malaysia. Consumer discussion seeking genuine feedback.

input_text: Climate resilience kena jadi priority la kat Malaysia. Every year banjir makin teruk, especially kat east coast. We need better drainage systems and urban planning.
reason: Mixed-language call for prioritizing climate resilience and flood mitigation in Malaysia's east coast.
